content_raw: S7 Custom Guitars Your Music, Your Guitar, Your Way $65/hour (30-minute minimum) Our Setup includes diagnostic and inspection of the entire guitar, a full inspection of electronics, Recommendations for upgrades and improvements, Fret dress and polish with high gloss buffing, Cleaning and oiling of the fretboard, Restring (Strings not included), Cleaning and adjusting nut slots, Balance trem/tailpiece. Saddle height adjustment, Intonation adjustment, adjust and balance pickup heights. Check the Add-Ons section for any extra charges that may apply. Hardtail Stratocaster, Telecaster, Les Paul, Standard 4 & 5 String Bass, 6 String Acoustic Guitars $85 Stratocaster style (2 point and 6 point) $90 $120 and up Includes restringing, tuning, light cleaning of hardware, adjusting saddle height for a proper string action, adjusting pickup height and output, adjusting intonation and polish of instrument. The cost of strings is not included. Most shops consider this a full set-up. $60 ($50 if added to other work) $75 ($65 if added to other work) $70 ($60 if added to other work) Includes leveling all the frets, re-crowning, and polishing of the frets and fretboard. This service is recommended even on new guitars to set them up to play their best. This also includes filing the fret ends (Fret Sprout) for $125 Includes leveling of the fretboard if needed $350 – Unbound fretboard $400 – Bound fretboard $450 – Unbound fretboard $500 – Bound fretboard $170 – Gloss finish $110 – Matte finish $60 $70 – 6 string $140 – 12 string $15 per fret + full fret level (required) $15 Per fret – Plus bench fees (If more than 3 a full fret level will be required) Includes hand cutting and shaping a new nut and fitting it to the guitar. Some variation in pricing is due to the unexpected difficulty in removing some nuts. It is recommended that a set-up also be done to ensure optimal playability. Prices include restringing but not the cost of strings. Full set-up is not included. These are labor prices and the cost of the nut blank is not included in these prices. If a full set-up is purchased with these services subtract $10 from each listed pricing (unless otherwise indicated below). $95 – Bone $100 – Bone $200 – Bone $65 Routing required $180 ($160 with full set-up) $65 Replacement only Routing Required and possible extension of nut shelf $180-$200 ($160-$180 with full set-up) $65 Replacement only $65 $50 – 6 string $75 – 12 String $20 upcharge Diagnostics (See bench fees) $45 $15 $75 – Bridge $55 – Neck $85 – Set $50 each or $85 per pair $50-$100 $100 $60 – L/P style $65 – Strat/Tele Style $125 – 1 pickup, 2 pots (Add $25 for each additional pickup or pot) 3 pickups on a pickguard $150 $200 plus bench and routing fees (if needed) (Does not include cover plates. Prices will vary) Copper or aluminum shielding tape $100-$250 + materials $75-$200 + materials $65 $50 $10 Per Pot + Bench fee See Bench Fees + materials $150-$275 – Solid body $175-$350 – Hollow/Semi-Hollow body $40 (Also included with set-up) $25 (Also included with set-up) $70 ($35 with set-up) $20 See bench fees $25-$75 (This is an add-on to a set-up) Drop-in with no modification $25+ cost of restring or set-up Some pickguards may require drilling new screw holes in the body. (Subtract $15 with purchase of a set-up) $40 $45-$85 This work may require some woodworking and prices only reflect labor. A full set-up will be required with any of these $80 (Includes plugging and drilling of holes if needed) $100 (Includes plugging the hole and making clearances for free movement if needed) $100 (Drop-in or Top Loader) $200+ materials (If through holes need to be drilled and string ferrules installed) $65-$100 Prices include disassembly, bridge locating, routing and woodworking, reassembly, and a full set-up. They do not include the cost of hardware. $350 – No existing trem $475 – No recess route-dive only $525 – With recessed route-pull sharp $350 $125 and up $75 and up Includes filling in body damage, sealing up finish, color matching, blending, clear coat, and wet sand/buff the whole affected area $350 and up $275-$325 (Set-up after reassembly recommended) $225 and up $150 and up $150+materials $100 and up We typically use automotive paint on electric guitars. If you see a color you like and we can get the paint code then we can have it matched. These prices are for labor only. The price of paints will vary and will be reflected in the price of the job. $350 and up $550 and up $950 and up $275 – Body only $250 – Body only $200 Add $75 Add $350 Add $250 Add $150 – 2 tone Add $175 – 3 tone $100 and up
